'''nozabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xtr|xtr]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xtr|xtr]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nozabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozabithi|nozabithi]] || [[word:nozabiji|nozabiji]] || [[word:nozabishi|nozabishi]] || [[word:nozabiki|nozabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozabuthuthu|nozabuthuthu]] || [[word:nozabujuju|nozabujuju]] || [[word:nozabushushu|nozabushushu]] || [[word:nozabukuku|nozabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozabuthu|nozabuthu]] || [[word:nozabuju|nozabuju]] || [[word:nozabushu|nozabushu]] || [[word:nozabuku|nozabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozabufthuf|nozabufthuf]] || [[word:nozabufjuf|nozabufjuf]] || [[word:nozabufshuf|nozabufshuf]] || [[word:nozabufkuf|nozabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozabethe|nozabethe]] || [[word:nozabeje|nozabeje]] || [[word:nozabeshe|nozabeshe]] || [[word:nozabeke|nozabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozabothotho|nozabothotho]] || [[word:nozabojojo|nozabojojo]] || [[word:nozaboshosho|nozaboshosho]] || [[word:nozabokoko|nozabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozabotho|nozabotho]] || [[word:nozabojo|nozabojo]] || [[word:nozabosho|nozabosho]] || [[word:nozaboko|nozaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozabofthof|nozabofthof]] || [[word:nozabofjof|nozabofjof]] || [[word:nozabofshof|nozabofshof]] || [[word:nozabofkof|nozabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfthĂŻf|nozabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfjĂŻf|nozabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfshĂŻf|nozabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfkĂŻf|nozabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nozabĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nozabĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nozabĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nozabĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfthĂŻf|nozabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfjĂŻf|nozabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfshĂŻf|nozabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfkĂŻf|nozabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfthĂŻf|nozabĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfjĂŻf|nozabĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfshĂŻf|nozabĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nozabĂŻfkĂŻf|nozabĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nozabĂŠthĂŠ|nozabĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nozabĂŠjĂŠ|nozabĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nozabĂŠshĂŠ|nozabĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nozabĂŠkĂŠ|nozabĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nozabathatha|nozabathatha]] || [[word:nozabajaja|nozabajaja]] || [[word:nozabashasha|nozabashasha]] || [[word:nozabakaka|nozabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nozabatha|nozabatha]] || [[word:nozabaja|nozabaja]] || [[word:nozabasha|nozabasha]] || [[word:nozabaka|nozabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nozabafthaf|nozabafthaf]] || [[word:nozabafjaf|nozabafjaf]] || [[word:nozabafshaf|nozabafshaf]] || [[word:nozabafkaf|nozabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nozabasha|nozabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozabshĂ«asha|nozabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozabroasha|nozabroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozabmuasha|nozabmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozabyaasha|nozabyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozabnkshĂ«asha|gonozabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozabnkroasha|gonozabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozabnkmuasha|gonozabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozabnkyaasha|gonozabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nozazabasha|nozazabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozazabshĂ«asha|nozazabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozazabroasha|nozazabroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozazabmuasha|nozazabmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozazabyaasha|nozazabyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozazabnkshĂ«asha|gonozazabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozazabnkroasha|gonozazabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozazabnkmuasha|gonozazabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozazabnkyaasha|gonozazabnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nezĂŠbasha|nezĂŠbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nezĂŠbshĂ«asha|nezĂŠbshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nezĂŠbroasha|nezĂŠbroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nezĂŠbmuasha|nezĂŠbmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nezĂŠbyaasha|nezĂŠbyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonezĂŠbnkshĂ«asha|gonezĂŠbnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonezĂŠbnkroasha|gonezĂŠbnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonezĂŠbnkmuasha|gonezĂŠbnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonezĂŠbnkyaasha|gonezĂŠbnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nozfabasha|nozfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nozfabshĂ«asha|nozfabshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nozfabroasha|nozfabroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nozfabmuasha|nozfabmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nozfabyaasha|nozfabyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonozfabnkshĂ«asha|gonozfabnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonozfabnkroasha|gonozfabnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonozfabnkmuasha|gonozfabnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonozfabnkyaasha|gonozfabnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
